events.name: New Orleans Saints at Atlanta Falcons

headlines.description: — An Atlanta Falcons team looking to snap a three-game losing streak and remain in contention in the NFC South wasn't going to be picky about how it won a game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ridder overcomes 2 interceptions to lead Falcons past Saints 24-15 and into first-place tie

headlines.description: — Days after firing offensive coordinator Matt Canada, the Pittsburgh Steelers showed new life on offense.
headlines.shortLinkText: Steelers pile up season-high 421 yards without Canada, beat Burrow-less Bengals 16-10

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans have plenty to clean up with too many penalties and mistakes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Derrick Henry runs for 2 TDs as the Titans hold off Panthers, Bryce Young 17-10

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Indianapolis Colts

headlines.description: — Jonathan Taylor and Zack Moss ran through the usually stingy Tampa Bay defense Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jonathan Taylor scores twice to help the Colts overpower Buccaneers run defense for 27-20 win

events.name: New England Patriots at New York Giants

headlines.description: — The New England Patriots have a problem at quarterback, and the New York Giants took advantage of it in winning consecutive games for the first time this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants edge Patriots and their woeful quarterbacks 10-7, aided by late missed field goal

headlines.description: — Trevor Lawrence and the Jacksonville Jaguars tried not to make too much of their win over the Houston Texans with plenty of football left this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trevor Lawrence throws for 364 yards, Texans miss late field goal as Jags hold on for 24-21 win

headlines.description: — No, Sean Payton said, he had no idea what a “Scorigami” was.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos' surging defense gets three more takeaways in 29-12 win over Browns

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Arizona Cardinals

headlines.description: — Kyren Williams cut across the offensive formation on his route before snagging his second touchdown pass of the game, pointing toward the crowd and then taking a bow.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford throws season-high 4 TDs. Rams roll to a 37-14 win over the Cardinals

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Three games in a row without a point in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patrick Mahomes throws 2 TDs, Chiefs rally from 14 down to beat Raiders 31-17

headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts walked off the Linc field with his arms extended in celebration as the Eagles crowd — which had booed the team off the field at halftime — went wild in appreciation for one more comeback, one more series of stupefying plays their...
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts runs for winning TD in overtime, Eagles rally past Josh Allen, Bills 37-34

events.name: Baltimore Ravens at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson has been waiting for wide receiver Zay Flowers to have a breakout game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zay Flowers catches and runs for TDs, Ravens force 4 turnovers in 20-10 win over Chargers
